query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl LIKE '%_UY218_%' OR coverImageUrl LIKE '%_UL320_%' OR coverImageUrl LIKE '%_UY320_%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as low_res,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl LIKE '%_SX500_%' OR coverImageUrl LIKE '%_SX600_%' OR coverImageUrl LIKE '%_SL500_%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as high_res,
  SUM(CASE WHEN authorName IS NULL OR authorName = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_author
FROM book_profiles;
command:

  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl LIKE '%_UY218_%' OR coverImageUrl LIKE '%_UL320_%' OR coverImageUrl LIKE '%_UY320_%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as low_res,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl LIKE '%_SX500_%' OR coverImageUrl LIKE '%_SX600_%' OR coverImageUrl LIKE '%_SL500_%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as high_res,
  SUM(CASE WHEN authorName IS NULL OR authorName = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_author
FROM book_profiles;
